title: LegenVD
description:
Magic the Gathering strategy videos with a focus on the digital Magic Arena.
This channel is supported by its fans on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

videos.title: Greasefang has a new best friend.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a white/blue/black or Esper Greasefang deck, featuring Abhorrent Oculus from Duskmourn in Explorer.
